title: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike
display_title: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Nov 24, 2015 4:30 pm The second collaboration between Monster Strike and Evangelion will have Kaworu as Lucifer. There will be also a crossover between Asuka and Uriel. [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2015-11-24/kaworu-looks-devilish-for-monster-magazine-cover/.95756[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by xPearse » Tue Nov 24, 2015 6:34 pm Turns out he was a lame version of Asuka from Devilman all along.

[]: Re: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Dec 07, 2015 3:54 pm Speaking of which, see here from 4:35: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AFc98lh69UA

[]: Re: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike             Quote Post by Dima » Wed Dec 09, 2015 5:16 am Nice find AR-99.

[]: Re: Kaworu becomes Lucifer in Monster Strike             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Dec 09, 2015 8:14 pm ^The channel's preview image for this set of CMs is Maken-Ki fan service. --> https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCuTNcn ... 7uq-X8mfTQ Japan has...interesting commercials.
